message.content: Read the main heading text from each of these section files in /Users/juliuscecilia/Desktop/schoolstack/schoolstack_landing/src/components/sections/: HeroSection.tsx, FounderStoryBridgeSection.tsx, WorkflowSection.tsx, FinalCTASection.tsx, PainSection.tsx, ProductPreviewSection.tsx, StacksSection.tsx, ProofSection.tsx, CustomSection.tsx. For each file, extract the main h1/h2 heading text. Just return the file name and the heading text, nothing else.

content.text: I'll read each section file and extract the main heading text for you.

19 20 Why this exists 21 22 23 24

25 School Stack started because 26
running a microschool exposed 27
everything regular software misses. 28

29 30 31 32

33 Sage Field had a real school to run, but no single system that fit the 34 way a microschool actually operates. Enrollment, contracts, parent 35 communication, payments, and internal workflows were all spread across 36 disconnected tools. School Stack started as the internal solution to 37 that problem, then became the product other founders needed too. 38

1 'use client' 2 3 import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react' 4 import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion' 5 import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/Badge' 6 import { FadeInView } from '@/components/ui/FadeInView' 7 8 type TabId = 'admin' | 'website' | 'enrollment' | 'parents' | 'teachers' | 'payments' | 'leads' 9 10 interface Tab { 11 id: TabId 12 label: string 13 caption: string 14 description: string 15 } 16 17 const TABS: Tab[] = [ 18 { 19 id: 'admin', 20 label: 'Admin', 21 caption: 'Admin Portal', 22 description: 'Track every applicant from first click to enrolled — with notes, approvals, and follow-up.', 23 }, 24 { 25 id: 'website', 26 label: 'Website', 27 caption: 'School Website', 28 description: 'A full school website with programs, FAQs, team, and calls to action.', 29 }, 30 { 31 id: 'enrollment', 32 label: 'Enrollment', 33 caption: 'Enrollment System', 34 description: 'Enrollment with health info, emergency contacts, uploads, and signatures.', 35 }, 36 { 37 id: 'parents', 38 label: 'Parents', 39 caption: 'Parent Portal', 40 description: 'Parents manage forms, payments, documents, and communication in one place.', 41 }, 42 { 43 id: 'teachers', 44 label: 'Teachers', 45 caption: 'Teacher Portal', 46 description: 'Teachers see students, log notes, track hours, and share updates.', 47 }, 48 { 49 id: 'payments', 50 label: 'Payments', 51 caption: 'Payments', 52 description: 'Every payment tracked, categorized, and tied to the right student and program.', 53 }, 54 { 55 id: 'leads', 56 label: 'Leads', 57 caption: 'Leads CRM', 58 description: 'Waitlist inquiries, tour bookings, and follow-up all live in one pipeline.', 59 }, 60 ] 61 62 export default function ProductPreviewSection() { 63 const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('admin') 64 const tabBarRef = useRef(null) 65 const tabRefs = useRef>(new Map()) 66 67 const currentTab = TABS.find((t) => t.id === activeTab)! 68 69 function handleTabChange(id: TabId) { 70 setActiveTab(id) 71 const el = tabRefs.current.get(id) 72 if (el) { 73 el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' }) 74 } 75 } 76 77 function handleKeyDown(e: React.KeyboardEvent, index: number) { 78 if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') { 79 e.preventDefault() 80 handleTabChange(TABS[(index + 1) % TABS.length].id) 81 } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { 82 e.preventDefault() 83 handleTabChange(TABS[(index - 1 + TABS.length) % TABS.length].id) 84 } 85 } 86 87 return ( 88

9 10 {/* Left — story + quote */} 11
12 13 Built at a real school 14 15 16 17

18 The founder story 19
is the product story. 20

21 22 23 24

25 School Stack was not imagined in a coworking space or assembled from 26 generic SaaS ideas. It was built to run Sage Field, a real microschool 27 in Texas, because the existing software options did not fit the way a 28 microschool actually operates. Every major module exists because it 29 solved an actual operational bottleneck inside the school. 30

31 32 33 {/* Pull quote — refined, no left border rail */} 34 35
36
37

38 “We were running a real school through too many disconnected tools, 39 so we built the system we wished existed. Once it worked for us, 40 it became obvious other founders needed it too.” 41

42
43 — Julius Cecilia, Founder, School Stack & Sage Field 44

content.text:
Here are the main heading texts from each section file:

**HeroSection.tsx**
"We built the software we couldn't find to run our own school."

**FounderStoryBridgeSection.tsx**
"School Stack started because running a microschool exposed everything regular software misses."

**WorkflowSection.tsx**
"From founder chaos to a school that runs cleanly in three steps."

**FinalCTASection.tsx**
"Your school deserves software built by someone who understands the work."

**PainSection.tsx**
"Most microschools are too big for spreadsheets and too small for enterprise software."

**ProductPreviewSection.tsx**
"Built in a real microschool. Shaped by real school operations."

**StacksSection.tsx**
"Start with the stack that fits. Extend it as your school grows."

**ProofSection.tsx**
"The founder story is the product story."

**CustomSection.tsx**
"Need something specific? We build custom, too."
